rich_text.notes: Text block with toolbar: bold, italic, underline, H2/H3, lists, table, code, link, blockquote

image.notes: Image block with URL or upload; inline preview in editor

video_embed.notes: Video block accepts YouTube, Vimeo, or .mp4 URL; renders inline preview in editor and learner view

video_upload.notes: Upload button present on video block form alongside URL field

quote_callout.notes: Separate Quote and Callout blocks both present in TEXT category

table.notes: Table editing is inside the rich text block toolbar (+row, +col, del), not a standalone block

timeline.notes: No timeline block visible in block picker

embed_iframe.notes: No iframe/embed block in picker; Document block supports PDF but not arbitrary iframes

code_block.notes: Code block with language field (e.g. typescript) and syntax-highlighted textarea

mcq.notes: Multiple Choice block in KNOWLEDGE CHECK category; 4 options A-D, radio select correct answer

true_false.notes: True/False block in KNOWLEDGE CHECK category

fill_blank.notes: Short Answer block accepts free text but is not a fill-in-the-blank with embedded gap

essay_open.notes: Short Answer block provides open text entry in learner view, but no AI or rubric-based scoring

knowledge_check_unscored.notes: In-lesson quiz blocks (MCQ, T/F, Short Answer) are knowledge checks; separate Assessment lesson type exists for scored exams

question_banks.notes: Assessment lessons have a question bank; MCP tools include import_questions, replace_questions, list_questions

randomisation.notes: Assessment config tool exists (update_assessment_config) but randomisation not confirmed from UI inspection

passing_score.notes: update_assessment_config MCP tool suggests configurable assessment settings; not surfaced prominently in UI editor

multiple_attempts.notes: Not visible in UI; may be in assessment config

ai_course_generation.notes: generate_lesson MCP tool generates full lesson content; restructure_course for full course restructure; all via MCP not in-UI

ai_content_rewrite.notes: rewrite_block, rewrite_lesson, rewrite_blocks MCP tools for AI-powered content rewriting

ai_quiz_generation.notes: generate_quiz_for_lesson MCP tool generates quiz questions for a lesson

ai_translation.notes: No translation tool in MCP or UI

ai_image_generation.notes: No AI image generation in UI or MCP

ai_learner_feedback.notes: No adaptive or AI feedback loop for learners

ai_tutor_chat.notes: No in-course AI tutor chat for learners

scorm_12.notes: SCORM 1.2 export as .zip in publish modal; description reads 'Upload to any LMS'

scorm_2004.notes: Only SCORM 1.2 listed; no SCORM 2004 option visible

xapi_tin_can.notes: No xAPI/Tin Can output visible in publish modal or export options

pdf_export.notes: No PDF export of full course; PDF Document block embeds PDFs as content

completion_tracking.notes: No analytics dashboard or completion tracking visible in UI

learner_progress_view.notes: No learner-facing progress dashboard beyond current lesson indicator in header

multi_author.notes: Single-author tool; courses belong to one user_id

review_approval_workflow.notes: review_course is an MCP AI review tool, not a human workflow

course_templates.notes: No template library when creating a course; blank course creation only

lesson_templates.notes: No lesson templates; blocks added individually

theme_customisation.notes: No theme or branding customisation in course settings

personalised_paths.notes: No personalised learning paths; assessment lessons use Leitner-based adaptive question selection but this is not full branching

direct_video_upload.notes: Upload button on video block; media stored in Supabase bucket (course-media)

cdn_hosting.notes: Media served from Supabase Storage which is CDN-backed

subtitle_caption_support.notes: No subtitle or caption field on video block

wcag_21_aa.notes: Not tested; no accessibility statement found in app

keyboard_navigation.notes: Block picker dismisses with Escape; slash-command works via keyboard; full keyboard audit not conducted

alt_text_support.notes: Image block form not fully inspected for alt text field during audit

shareable_link_no_lms.notes: Instant shareable URL on publish; one-click copy in publish modal

password_protection.notes: No password protection; courses are either public (open URL) or private (requires login)

sso_learner_access.notes: No SSO for learner access; learners use public URL or must have an account

embed_in_external_site.notes: HTML export can be self-hosted and embedded; no direct embed/iframe code snippet provided in UI

rest_api.notes: No documented public REST API; Supabase backend exists but no public API layer

mcp_server.notes: Full MCP server at /mcp with 32 tools: list_courses, get_course, create_course, update_course, delete_course, save_course, restructure_course, review_course, add_lesson, update_lesson, delete_lesson, get_lesson, generate_lesson, rewrite_lesson, add_block, update_block, move_block, delete_block, rewrite_block, rewrite_blocks, add_assessment_lesson, list_questions, add_question, update_question, delete_question, import_questions, replace_questions, update_assessment_config, upload_media, preview_course, generate_quiz_for_lesson, tidelearn_login, tidelearn_logout

sso_author_access.notes: Google OAuth for author sign-in via Supabase Auth; tested end-to-end
